fluxer 0.6.1
  • Reference

fluxer

FLUX collection of functions and utilities

Develop

Functions

Remember to document the functions using roxygen-like code, naming and importing dependencies correctly and testing it.

Add datasets

Load or create the dataset in R. then use the usethis::use_data(x). It will be stored in data/x.rda. Remember to create the documentation in the R directory named x.R

Build the package 

devtools::document()
devtools::build()

## If needed testing
devtools::load_all()
